episodes.title: Former President Bill Clinton testifies before Congress on Epstein case
episodes.description:
Former President Bill Clinton told members of Congress on Friday that he “did nothing wrong” in his relationship with Jeffrey Epstein and saw no signs of Epstein's sexual abuse as he faced hours of grilling from lawmakers over his connections to the disgraced financier from more than two decades ago. “I saw nothing, and I did nothing wrong,” the former Democratic president said in an opening statement he shared on social media at the outset of the deposition.
https://www.wishtv.com/news/politics/bill-clinton-deposed-epstein-congress/

episodes.title: Epstein estate to pay up to $35 million to settle sex trafficking lawsuit
episodes.description:
The estate of Jeffrey Epstein agreed on Thursday to pay up to $35 million to settle a class-action lawsuit brought by survivors of the late convicted sex offender. The complaint, which was first filed in 2024, alleges that Darren Indyke and Richard Kahn, co-executors of Epstein’s estate, “facilitated” Epstein’s “sex trafficking and abuse” and “were also integral in allowing Epstein to escape justice for years by concealing his litany of crimes.”
https://www.wishtv.com/news/national/epstein-estate-to-pay-up-to-35-million-to-settle-sex-trafficking-lawsuit/

episodes.title: Justice Department un-redacts more names in Epstein files
episodes.description:
The Justice Department on Monday un-redacted more names in the Jeffrey Epstein files after pressure from lawmakers who reviewed unredacted versions of several records.

FULL STORY: https://www.wishtv.com/news/justice-department-un-redacts-more-names-in-epstein-files-after-pressure-from-lawmakers/
